thesis: Strong rising analyst revisions on a small-cap consumer/food name; a 1-6 month revision tilt with the highest conviction in the book.
falsification: Revisions roll over (ARM falls below peer median) or the stock underperforms NIFTY SMALLCAP 250 over the next quarter while revisions fade.

thesis: Strong upward analyst revisions signal an earnings inflection in a beaten-down consumer brand; revision momentum leads price here.
falsification: Next results miss and revisions turn down, or price lags the small-cap index over 3 months.

thesis: Strong analyst revisions reflect improving gas-spread economics; a cyclical revision tilt with defensible cash flows.
falsification: Gas spreads compress / volumes disappoint and revisions reverse, or relative underperformance over the quarter.

thesis: Improving analyst revisions on a small-finance bank as asset-quality fears ease; cyclical financials tilt.
falsification: Credit costs re-accelerate or NIM compresses and revisions fall; or it lags the index over 3 months.

thesis: Rising analyst revisions confirm scaling monetisation in a structural digital-media franchise.
falsification: Revisions fade after results or regulatory/gaming-tax headlines hit, with relative underperformance.

thesis: Upward revisions reflect a favourable agri/subsidy cycle; cyclical revision tilt with cheap valuation backstop.
falsification: Input costs spike or subsidy mechanics worsen and revisions reverse; or underperformance over the quarter.

thesis: Rising revisions on a quality, low-volatility consumer-healthcare name add a defensive anchor with momentum.
falsification: Revisions stall and the defensive premium de-rates, or it lags a rising small-cap index materially.

thesis: Improving analyst revisions track an NBFC franchise rebuild; cyclical financials tilt with momentum.
